summary: Observed the AutoDiscovery 502 path without mutating appliance state. Apache maps /ms-autodiscovery to 127.0.0.1:8095 and redirects that path into /AutoDiscovery, which currently returns 502 because Apache cannot resolve the ProxyPass host AutoDiscovery. Independently, ms-autodiscovery.service is inactive/dead and nothing is listening on 8095, so the backend itself is also down.
follow_up_recommendations: Validate whether /AutoDiscovery should proxy through the AutoDiscovery hostname at all, or whether the ProxyPass target should be changed to a resolvable local endpoint.
Investigate why ms-autodiscovery.service is inactive/dead and confirm the expected startup relationship for the service that should own port 8095.
After fixing hostname resolution and restoring the 8095 backend, re-run direct and Apache-facing checks for /v2/api-docs to confirm the 502 path is cleared.
